sections.paragraph:
ὑπόδειγμα, ατος, τό [ὑπό, δεῖγμα, s. ὑποδείϰνυμι]

—1. ‘someth. that serves as an indicator or directive for personal moral decision’

—a. w. focus on function as pattern for good behaviorexample J 13:15.

—b. w. focus on function as deter-rent from bad behavior pattern, type Hb 4:11; Js 5:10; 2 Pt 2:6.

—2. ‘someth. that serves as an indicator or model for someth. coming later in a diffferent context’, symbolic expression Hb 8:5; 9:23.
